title: Monumenta Charm Uploader
description: Uploads zenith charms onto the fallen forum
body:
Addon for the Monumenta CTM MMORPG Minecraft Server.

This mod is used to upload zenith charms to [The Fallen Forum](https://fallenforum.com/charms). Charm uploading can be enabled/disabled in game through mod menu. The mod uploads charms from chests, the vzc menu, and item pickups. Completely hands-off.

**IMPORTANT:** Uploading charms from player plots requires the plot owner's consent. Reach out to me on Discord if you are interested in contributing your charms to the database.

**YOU MUST HAVE WORLD SPOOFING ON FOR CHARMS TO BE UPLOADED**

Please report any issues directly to NiamN.

Current Features:
- Uploading zenith charms to [The Fallen Forum](https://fallenforum.com/charms)
- Strike/Boss/Hunt/SKR Timers (Preloaded but configurable in config)
